reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Logic inversion at line 58 confirmed: function returns early when blobsCount > 0, preventing RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE error. An attacker can trigger this via P2P by requesting data columns by range, causing the node to return partial sidecars instead of error when missing custody columns, violating the all-or-nothing requirement.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7594 PeerDAS - All sidecars of a block must be included in by_range response if any sidecar is included
